entries.final_answer: facade-first: adopt the existing MissionStatus/OHS facade (Cluster B status surface) FIRST so downstream consumers have one stable status authority; then read-path (A), then artifact-placement (D, unblocks #1814/#1816), then runtime writers (E, highest-risk) last; extend parity ratchet + delete dead symbols throughout (strangler-ordered).
entries.question: In what order should the ~7 resolvers (Clusters A-E) be strangled onto the unified context?

entries.final_answer: extend occurrence-map: grow the occurrence-map schema (and the bulk-edit-classification skill) to model multi-path structural moves (from->to path mappings) in addition to the 8 term-rename categories; one artifact, broader schema. FR-010 becomes a construction IC.
entries.question: How to resolve the FR-010 bulk-edit/occurrence-map structural-move gap (#1815)?
